employees.name: Samuel Xifaras
limitations: auth-service — not owner, limited context on token/session internals
database internals — can run basic queries but should not make schema or replication changes
security incidents — any suspected breach or token forgery must go to security team
cross-team escalations — issues spanning more than 2 services need manager sign-off
employees.notes: Comfortable owning checkout and API gateway incidents end-to-end. For auth or DB issues, can stabilize but should loop in owners or manager for root cause decisions.

employees.name: Joe Manager
expertise: incident command for P0/P1 multi-service outages
resource and staffing decisions during incidents
employees.notes: Escalation point for anything outside the primary on-call engineer's ownership area, or when an incident has broad business impact. Ping for: auth incidents, DB failures, security events, or any P1 unresolved after 15 minutes.
